The '''Mission to [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]]''' was carried out by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]] for the [[New Jedi Order]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].

==Mission==
[[File:TaanabSP3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Taanab Spaceport]] where the mission took place.]]

===Rancor on the loose===
When a freighter captain reported sightings of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], Jaden Korr was sent to Taanab to investigate its [[Taanab Spaceport|spaceport]]. There, he confronted a massive, [[Taanab mutant rancor|mutated rancor]], foolishly released by a [[Sith cultist/Legends|Sith Cultist]], who promptly became the beast's first victim. After realizing that the rancor cannot be killed by any weapon, Korr fled and tried to find a way to stop it.

While leading the rancor on a chase through the spacesport, Korr encountered some Cultists and [[New Reborn]] who tried to stop him, and either killed them or let the rancor deal with them.

Korr managed to lure the rancor to a conveyer belt with a [[Force field/Legends|force field]] at the end. He then fought his way into the control room and activated the controls, causing the rancor to be crushed to death between the force field and a large, durable container.

===Aftermath===
After returning to the [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]], Korr and the Jedi speculated that the cultists were planning to unleash the rancor in the city and, during the ensuing pandemonium, steal supplies and [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
